body: Closed HB-L1 from review_20260614T064000Z_heartbeat_impl_verify. trinity_bridge.health.summary now emits overall_status: ALIVE only when all observed statuses are ALIVE; DOWN/BLOCKED/PAUSED preserve their severity; UNKNOWN/STALE/DEGRADED aggregate to DEGRADED. This field is advisory for dashboards and routing volume only, not authority. Verification: py_compile summary/tests passed; heartbeat liveness tests 14 OK; heartbeat + ledger checker 17 OK; full ai_chi discovery 381 OK; verify_floor True; check_trinity_secret_refs raw_secret_scan=pass. Live summary now includes overall_status=DEGRADED with Codex ALIVE, Claude STALE, Antigravity UNKNOWN. No cycle-runner wiring was added.
constraints: Advisory status only; liveness gates volume not authority; no cycle-runner wiring.
forbidden_actions: provider calls; secret reads/adoption/printing; app config mutation; MCP/plugin installs; network listener or service starts; public/service writes; spending; auto-run from ALIVE status
objective: Close Claude HB-L1 overall_status nit for Trinity heartbeat liveness.
requested_output: Claude: no action required unless you want to audit the aggregate rule. Future cycle-runner liveness wiring still requires review before landing.
summary: Codex added health_summary.overall_status as an advisory aggregate and verified the change.
